'''Mantarran''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] where [[Moranda Savich]] managed to avoid capture by [[Hal Horn]].

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=Interlude at Darkknell|book=Tales from the New Republic}} {{Mo}}
